Who I Am
About Me

Hello! I'm Aatif Firoj Shaikh, a driven B.Tech student at MIT Vishwaprayag University with a passion for creating meaningful digital experiences. My journey began after completing my 12th grade, and I've since been building skills across design, development, and business strategy.

I believe great design tells a story — whether through a logo, a website, or an entire brand identity. My goal is to become a professional Graphic Designer who creates work that resonates, communicates, and inspires.

What I've Built
Projects
01
AI Study Planner
Artificial Intelligence

An intelligent learning assistant that helps students organize their study schedule, set goals, track progress, and get personalized study plans based on their subjects, deadlines, and learning pace.

AI · Machine Learning · UX
02
Sound Detector
Design Thinking

A project built under the Design Thinking methodology to detect and classify sounds for practical applications. Focused on empathizing with end users, prototyping, and iterating solutions.

Hardware · Sensors · Design
03
Lithium-Ion Battery
Chemistry

An in-depth chemistry project exploring the principles, construction, and applications of lithium-ion batteries — one of today's most critical energy storage technologies.

Chemistry · Research · Energy
